tasks.subject: Task 0: Create pitch/ folder and README index
tasks.description: Create pitch/ folder at repo root with README.md indexing all 5 deliverables, reading order, and pitch-day checklist.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Write pitch/PITCH_SCRIPT.md
tasks.description: Word-for-word 3-min speaker script, 9 timed blocks summing to 180s, 460-500 words, closing line per spec.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Write pitch/SLIDE_DECK_OUTLINE.md
tasks.description: 9 slides with Headline/Body/Visual/Layout/Speaker reference each, ready to paste into Google Slides.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Write pitch/DEMO_SCREENCAST_SHOTLIST.md
tasks.description: 5 shot blocks for 30s screencast with on-screen captions, recording specs, failure-mode fallbacks.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Write pitch/BUSINESS_PLAN.md
tasks.description: 4-page business plan, 8 sections, 1500-2200 words, hybrid B2G+B2B+B2C with named buyers/sponsors and 3yr projection.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Write pitch/QA_PREP.md
tasks.description: 8 anticipated Q&A pairs, 60-90 word answers each, tone guidance.
